mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT v.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName FROM vw_user_auth v JOIN users u ON u.user_code = v.user_code WHERE v.project_code = #{projectCode} AND u.is_lock != 1 ORDER BY u.name

SELECT DISTINCT v2.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName FROM vw_user_auth v2 JOIN users u ON u.user_code = v2.user_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v1 WHERE v1.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v1.project_code = v2.project_code ) ORDER BY u.name
